title: Shut My Big Mouth
writer: Oliver Drake, Karen DeWolf, Francis Martin
actors: Joe E. Brown, Adele Mara, Victor Jory
plot: Wellington Holmes, a timid and very shy horticulturist, heads for Big Bluff. When the stagecoach is held up by Buckskin Bill and his men, he coincidentally knocks out three of them earning himself the unwanted job, as Marshal of B...
